mapper.select: SELECT revision_id AS "revisionId", tenant_id AS "tenantId", project_id AS "projectId", expected_version AS "expectedVersion", aggregate_version AS "aggregateVersion", region_codes::text AS "regionCodes", network_ids::text AS "networkIds", added_region_codes::text AS "addedRegionCodes", removed_region_codes::text AS "removedRegionCodes", added_network_ids::text AS "addedNetworkIds", removed_network_ids::text AS "removedNetworkIds", reason, revised_by AS "revisedBy", revised_at AS "revisedAt" FROM prj_project_scope_revision WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND project_id=#{projectId} AND aggregate_version < #{cursorVersion} ORDER BY aggregate_version DESC LIMIT #{fetchSize}
